zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas South於1545年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 凱斯迪文時，他的父親Sir George Southe45歲，母親Jane Grace Danby40歲。他於1569年與Audrey Michell結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1639年12月13日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: South
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English south ‘south’, denoting someone who had migrated ‘from the south’, especially someone from southern England living in the north of the country. It may also have been used as a topographic name to denote someone living in the southern part of a settlement or region. Compare Southern .

variants.name: Suderman
meanings: Americanized form of German Sudermann: topographic name for someone living to the south of a settlement or for an incomer from the south, from Middle Low German sūder ‘south’ + man ‘man’. Compare South .

variants.name: Southern
meanings: English (Lancashire): nickname from Middle English s(o)uthern(e), sothron ‘southern’ (Old English sūtherne, Old Norse suthrænn), for someone ‘from the south’, particularly as a northern English nickname for someone from the south of the country and as a Scottish nickname for an Englishman.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas South was born in 1545, in North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir George Southe, was 45 and his mother, Jane Grace Danby, was 40. He married Audrey Michell in 1569. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 December 1639, in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas South est né en 1545, à North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Southe, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Jane Grace Danby, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Audrey Michell en 1569. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1639, à Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas South è nato il nel 1545 nel North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir George Southe, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Jane Grace Danby, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Audrey Michell nel 1569. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 dicembre 1639, nel Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Southが1545年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース ケステベンで生まれた時，父Sir George Southeは45歳，母Jane Grace Danbyは40歳であった。1569年にAudrey Michellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1639年12月13日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオルで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオルにて埋葬された。

ko.Great and Little Horningsheath, Suffolk,: 영국 수폴크 그리트 앤드 리틀 호른잉셰앳h
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas South(이)가 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 케스티븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Southe(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Grace Danby(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1569년 Audrey Michell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1639년 12월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스와프함 플리어에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스와프함 플리어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas South nasceu em 1545, em North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir George Southe, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jane Grace Danby, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Audrey Michell em 1569. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1639, em Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Great and Little Horningsheath, Suffolk,: грит анд литл хаурнингшит, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas South родился в 1545 г. в местности норт кестивен, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir George Southe было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Grace Danby, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Audrey Michell в 1569 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 декабря 1639 г. в местности сваффхам приор, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности сваффхам приор, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas South nació en 1545, en North Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir George Southe, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Jane Grace Danby, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Audrey Michell en 1569. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1639, en Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultado en Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
